items.title: Amazon CloudWatch Logs announces increased query result limits
items.snippet: Amazon CloudWatch Logs now supports retrieving up to 100,000 results using the Logs Insights query language. Customers can specify the limit in their query using the LIMIT command. Previously, customers were limited to 10,000 results and had to split their…

items.title: Amazon EMR Serverless is now available in additional AWS Regions
items.snippet: Amazon EMR Serverless is now generally available in six additional AWS Regions - Asia Pacific (Hyderabad), Asia Pacific (Malaysia), Asia Pacific (New Zealand), Asia Pacific (Taipei), Asia Pacific (Thailand), and Mexico (Central). Amazon EMR Serverless is a…

items.title: AWS Partner Central agents now accelerates opportunity creation
items.snippet: Today, AWS announces that the AWS Partner Central agents now accelerate opportunity creation through natural language conversation. AWS Partner Central agents, released on March 16, 2026, are AI-powered capabilities built on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore that help…

items.title: The AWS AI Security Framework: Securing AI with the right controls, at the right layers, at the right phases
items.snippet: TL;DR for busy executives The AWS AI Security Framework helps security leaders move fast and stay secure with AI. Security compounds from day 1 as workloads evolve from prototype to production to scale. Assess first. Request a no-cost SHIP engagement to…

items.title: Amazon Connect Cases now lets you edit related items and delete cases from the agent workspace
items.snippet: Amazon Connect Cases now supports editing and deleting related items, and deleting cases directly from the agent workspace without administrator help. Agents can update comments, unlink contacts associated with the wrong case, or delete cases opened in error.…

items.title: Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL announces Extended Support minor versions 11.22-rds.20260224, 12.22-rds.20260224, and 13.23-rds.20260224
items.snippet: Amazon Relational Database Service (RDS) for PostgreSQL announces Amazon RDS Extended Support minor versions 11.22-rds.20260224, 12.22-rds.20260224, and 13.23-rds.20260224. We recommend that you upgrade to these versions to fix known security vulnerabilities…

items.title: Amazon Managed Grafana now supports in-place upgrade to Grafana version 12.4
items.snippet: Amazon Managed Grafana now supports in-place upgrade from Grafana version 10.4 to 12.4. You can upgrade with just a few clicks from the AWS Console or via AWS SDK or AWS CLI. Upgrading to version 12.4 brings native Grafana Scenes-powered dashboards for faster…

items.title: AWS announces AWS Interconnect - multicloud connectivity with Oracle Cloud Infrastructure in preview
items.snippet: AWS announces the public preview of AWS Interconnect — multicloud with Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI). Customers have been adopting multicloud strategies while migrating more applications to the cloud. They do so for many reasons including interoperability…

items.title: AWS Organizations now supports higher quotas for service control policies (SCPs)
items.snippet: AWS Organizations now supports higher quotas for service control policies (SCPs). The maximum number of SCPs that can be attached to a single node (root, OU, or account) has increased from 5 to 10, and the maximum SCP size has increased from 5,120 to 10,240…

items.title: Amazon CloudFront announces support for OCSP Revocation for Mutual TLS (Viewer)
items.snippet: Amazon CloudFront now supports Online Certificate Status Protocol (OCSP) revocation checking for viewer mTLS, enabling you to validate client certificate revocation status in real time during connection establishment. This enables customers using mutual TLS…

items.title: Amazon CloudFront announces Passthrough Mode for mutual TLS (Viewer)
items.snippet: Amazon CloudFront now supports passthrough mode for mutual TLS (mTLS) viewer authentication, allowing CloudFront to forward client certificates to the origin without verifying the certificates on CloudFront. Customers who already validate client certificates…

items.title: Amazon Bedrock introduces new advanced prompt optimization and migration tool
items.snippet: Amazon Bedrock Advanced Prompt Optimization enables customers to optimize their prompts for their current model or migrate prompts to new models faster than before with built-in evaluation feedback loops. Optimize your prompts and compare results for up to 5…

items.title: Amazon Bedrock Introduces Advanced Prompt Optimization and Migration Tool
items.snippet: Customers spend days to weeks optimizing prompts and evaluating responses when they want to migrate to a new model or just get better performance out of their current model. They struggle with changing their prompts quickly and then testing them to prevent…

items.title: Announcing general availability of Amazon EC2 M3 Ultra Mac instances
items.snippet: Amazon Web Services announces general availability of Amazon EC2 M3 Ultra Mac instances, powered by the latest Mac Studio hardware. Amazon EC2 M3 Ultra Mac instances are the next-generation EC2 Mac instances, that enable Apple developers to migrate their most…

items.title: Regional routing for AWS access portals: Implementing custom vanity domains for IAM Identity Center
items.snippet: AWS IAM Identity Center provides a web-based access portal that gives your workforce a single place to view their AWS accounts and applications. With the recent launch of IAM Identity Center multi-Region replication, customers can replicate their IAM Identity…

items.title: Amazon EC2 High Memory U7i instances now available in AWS Europe (Paris) region
items.snippet: Amazon EC2 High Memory U7i-12TB instances (u7i-12tb.224xlarge) and U7in-16TB instances (u7in-16tb.224xlarge) are now available in the AWS Europe (Paris) region. U7i instances are part of the AWS 7th generation and are powered by custom fourth-generation Intel…

items.title: SageMaker AI now supports serverless model customization for Qwen3.6
items.snippet: Amazon SageMaker AI now supports serverless model customization for Qwen3.6 27B parameter model using supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement fine-tuning (RFT). Qwen3.6 is a popular open-weight model family from Alibaba Cloud. This launch is an…

items.title: AWS Transform agents now available in Kiro, Claude, Cursor, and Codex
items.snippet: Today, AWS announces that the AWS Transform agents — built on decades of AWS migration and modernization experience — are now accessible through a Kiro power, agent plugins, and via the AWS Transform MCP server. Developers can now consume all of AWS…

items.title: AWS Transform introduces the agent builder toolkit Kiro power for building customized transformation agents
items.snippet: Today, as part of the AWS Transform composability initiative, AWS announces the general availability of the agent builder toolkit Kiro power for AWS Transform. With the agent builder toolkit, AWS Partners and customers can build agents tailored to their…

items.title: AWS Transform now supports customer-owned artifact stores
items.snippet: AWS Transform brings assessment, migration, and modernization into a single AI-powered experience that guides enterprises through their full transformation journey. Today, AWS announces support for customer-owned Amazon S3 buckets, giving customers full…

items.title: New models for image generation and text embeddings are now available in Amazon SageMaker JumpStart
items.snippet: Today, AWS announced the availability of FLUX.2-klein-base-4B and Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B in Amazon SageMaker JumpStart, expanding the portfolio of foundation models available to AWS customers. These models from Black Forest Labs and Qwen bring state-of-the-art…

items.title: ARC Region switch adds Lambda event source mapping execution block for event handling during failover
items.snippet: Amazon Application Recovery Controller (ARC) Region Switch helps customers orchestrate the failover of their multi-Region applications to achieve a bounded recovery time in the event of a Regional impairment. Today, we are announcing the Lambda event source…

items.title: Amazon Aurora DSQL now supports change data capture (Preview)
items.snippet: Amazon Aurora DSQL introduces support for change data capture (CDC) in preview, enabling you to stream real-time database changes directly to Amazon Kinesis Data Streams. This fully managed capability removes the need to build or maintain custom streaming…

items.title: Three new models for speech recognition and text-to-speech are now available in Amazon SageMaker JumpStart
items.snippet: Today, AWS announced the availability of Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-1.7B-CustomVoice, Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-1.7B-Base, and Qwen3-ASR-1.7B in Amazon SageMaker JumpStart, expanding the portfolio of foundation models available to AWS customers. These three models from Qwen bring…

items.title: Two new models for agentic coding and efficient AI are now available in Amazon SageMaker JumpStart

items.title: Reference stack outputs across accounts and Regions with AWS CloudFormation and CDK
items.snippet: AWS CloudFormation now supports a new intrinsic function, Fn::GetStackOutput, that enables you to reference stack outputs across AWS accounts and Regions directly within your CloudFormation templates and CDK applications. This new capability simplifies the…

items.title: Amazon EC2 X8aedz instances are now available in Europe (Ireland) region
items.snippet: Starting today, Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2) X8aedz instances are available in Europe (Ireland) region. These instances are powered by 5th Gen AMD EPYC processors (formerly code named Turin). These instances offer the highest maximum CPU…

items.title: Amazon Connect Customer launches permission for agents to view only their own performance evaluations
items.snippet: Amazon Connect Customer now supports a permission that gives agents access to their own performance evaluations in the Connect UI, without exposing other agents' evaluations, so they can review feedback to improve their performance. With this permission,…

items.title: Automating post-quantum cryptography readiness using AWS Config
items.snippet: Migrating your TLS endpoints to Post-quantum cryptography (PQC) starts with understanding your current TLS endpoint inventory and posture. This post introduces the PQC Readiness Scanner — an automated tool that inventories your Application Load Balancer…
